title: Co-Design, Equity, and Accessible Participation · Claim Audit: Equity Impact
summary: The team invites affected people only after scope is fixed and treats feedback as approval rather than shared problem framing and decision power. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp2 equity impact increment in co-design plan and equity impact record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare benefits, burdens, error rates, exclusion, recourse, and resource demands across relevant groups without inventing demographic certainty.
Budget format, assistive technology, language, schedule, compensation, connectivity, cognitive load, and support accommodations before recruitment.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Equity Impact · Theory Equity Impact
steps.instruction:
theory case — Affected people are invited after scope is fixed, receive inaccessible materials, and never learn which input changed the decision. The theory variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Equity Impact contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Equity Impact · Theory Equity Impact.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for compare benefits, burdens, error rates, exclusion, recourse, and resource demands across relevant groups without inventing demographic certainty. For Predict Equity Impact · Theory Equity Impact, keep Equity Impact connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Affected people are invited after scope is fixed, receive inaccessible materials, and never learn which input changed the decision. The theory variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Equity Impact condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: ACM IEEE AAAI Computer Science Curricula 2023 — Controls competency-based progression, project work, professional practice, ethics, accessibility, security, testing, and the integration of knowledge with observable performance.

hints: For Predict Equity Impact · Theory Equity Impact, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Equity Impact precondition, or invariant that must hold.

The theory variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

content.text: Compare benefits, burdens, error rates, exclusion, recourse, and resource demands across relevant groups without inventing demographic certainty. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Equity Impact while producing co-design plan and equity impact record.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Affected people are invited after scope is fixed, receive inaccessible materials, and never learn which input changed the decision. The worked example variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Compare benefits, burdens, error rates, exclusion, recourse, and resource demands across relevant groups without inventing demographic certainty. A defensible solution applies Equity Impact, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to co-design plan and equity impact record.

content.code:
# Worked focus: pp2-equity-impact — Compare benefits, burdens, error rates, exclusion, recourse, and resource demands across relevant groups without inventing demographic certainty.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-5
focus: pp2-equity-impact
decision-evidence: Compare benefits, burdens, error rates, exclusion, recourse, and resource demands across relevant groups without inventing demographic certainty.
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Equal treatment necessarily produces equitable outcomes. This fails the Equity Impact contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

steps.title: Defend the Equity Impact model · Theory Equity Impact
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Equity Impact: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Affected people are invited after scope is fixed, receive inaccessible materials, and never learn which input changed the decision. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Compare benefits, burdens, error rates, exclusion, recourse, and resource demands across relevant groups without inventing demographic certainty.

Evidence target: Defend the Equity Impact model · Theory Equity Impact.
steps.why: Retrieving Equity Impact through the concrete co-design plan and equity impact record case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend the Equity Impact model · Theory Equity Impact, keep Equity Impact connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Compare benefits, burdens, error rates, exclusion, recourse, and resource demands across relevant groups without inventing demographic certainty.
